title: helictotrichon alpinum
intro: Helictotrichon alpinum, also known as Blue Oat Grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Helictotrichon alpinum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
